issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in post-referral workflow
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks in the post-referral workflow. The issue was caused by a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset
issues.desc: When a deal was flipped from Offer Accepted back to a prior stage and then returned to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The criterion was added to fix the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted and did not receive TC workflow tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks continuing after deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly suppressing tasks for these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was made to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any erroneous check-in tasks received for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's name rather than the updated one. The issue affected agent-facing automated emails. The fix was handled by Luis on the product side.
issues.workaround: Manually send any affected agent communications with the correct LO information for deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks after referral accepted on March 18th
issues.desc: A deal accepted as a referral on March 18th did not trigger any post-referral workflow tasks for the HA. The root cause was an error in how data was being pulled, preventing the workflow from filtering correctly. The issue was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll affected deals into the post-referral workflow and reach out to leads manually for any touchpoints missed during the impact window.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent at Offer Accepted stage before credit amount is available
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was being sent when a deal entered the Offer Accepted stage, before closing information had been submitted to calculate the credit. The SMS should only send at the Sale Pending stage with the actual dollar amount. It was confirmed to be a dash-triggered message and was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually send buyers the correct credit amount SMS once closing information has been submitted for any deals that received the premature SMS during the impact window.
